Report.Name: Microsoft Purview As Built Report
Report._comment_Name: Keep this in sync with Options.ReportType. AsBuilt = "Microsoft Purview As Built Report" | Assessment = "Microsoft Purview Optimization Assessment Report". The module also auto-corrects this at runtime based on ReportType.
Report._comment_CoverPageImage: Leave blank. The module automatically sets this to the bundled Purview logo (Src/Public/AsBuiltReport.Microsoft.Purview.png) at runtime. You can override with an absolute path to a custom PNG if desired.

Options._comment_ReportType: AsBuilt = standard documentation | Assessment = POA controls only | Both = AsBuilt + POA assessment. ACSC ISM summary is triggered independently by InfoLevel >= 3 and always appears before the POA section.
Options._comment_TranscriptPath: Optional. Full path to a log file, e.g. C:\Reports\Purview_Debug.log. Leave blank to disable. The log captures all INFO/SUCCESS/WARNING/ERROR events plus PScribo document warnings.

InfoLevel._comment_: 0 = Disabled | 1 = Summary | 2 = Detailed | 3 = Detailed + ACSC ISM / Essential Eight compliance summary appended after all AsBuilt sections. Set any section to 3 to trigger the ACSC section.
